page: OVHcloud c3-256 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. It features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs operating at a base clock speed of 2.3 GHz with a single thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. The hardware configuration includes 256 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Local storage is provided by a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and the instance is equipped with a 20 Gbps baseline network interface and one complimentary public IPv4 address.

In benchmark evaluations, the c3-256 demonstrates top-tier multi-core performance, placing in the top 10% for multi-core stress-ng workloads, PassMark CPU tests, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Its memory subsystem achieves top-tier read bandwidth for small cached blocks, though uncached large-block reads fall into the average range. Cryptographic and vector processing capabilities are supported by hardware-accelerated AES, SHA_NI, and AVX instructions, resulting in top-tier scores in PassMark encryption and extended instruction tests.

This server is highly suited for parallelized compute-heavy workloads, software compilation, and high-throughput database operations, as evidenced by its strong performance in Clang compilation and Redis SET operations. The dedicated core allocation and high physical core density offer predictable performance for multi-threaded applications. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the 1:2 RAM-to-vCPU ratio optimizes resource spend specifically for CPU-bound tasks, avoiding the overhead of excess memory capacity while delivering high compute density.
description: OVHcloud c3-256 is a compute-optimized server featuring 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs on an AMD EPYC x86_64 architecture running at 2.3 GHz. It is configured with 256 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and a 20 Gbps baseline network interface. Lacking hyperthreading, the server delivers dedicated, predictable performance per core. Benchmarks place this instance in the top tier for multi-core CPU execution, software compilation, and memory bandwidth for cached blocks, while single-core performance and large-block uncached memory writes remain strong. This hardware profile is highly efficient for CPU-intensive, parallelized workloads such as software compilation, cryptography, and database operations, offering a dense compute-to-RAM ratio that minimizes memory overhead for pure processing tasks.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-256 is a compute-optimized server featuring 128 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 256 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier multi-core performance for parallelized workloads.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-256 is a compute-optimized server with 128 AMD EPYC cores, 256 GB RAM, and 400 GB NVMe storage, built for high-throughput parallel workloads.
tagline: A high-density, dedicated 128-core compute platform designed for parallel processing, software compilation, and high-throughput database workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores with no hyperthreading
256 GB of system memory and 400 GB local NVMe SSD storage
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address
Top-tier multi-core CPU, compilation, and cryptographic benchmark performance
Optimized for parallel computing, database operations, and software compilation
